text:
There was once a shy girl named Dawn. She lived alone in an old house beside an enormous oak tree. Every Saturday morning she would go there to read.

One day, an old black cat slipped into Dawn's room. It stared at her with a gentle eye. Dawn petted it. It slept.

That week at school, Dawn started talking to the cat. Her classmates thought she had lost her mind. They called her the cat.

Weeks turned months. Dawn cared for the cat. They grew close.

One night, the cat howled.

The alarm went off.

They searched.

There!

A fox.

Back home.

Auntie.

It was just a dream. Dawn smiled.

From then on, she read even more. She loved cats. She dreamed of foxes.

They had their own little woods. So Dawn didn’t mind.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
